TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yalisetute šļěťáĆśĖĮŚ§öŚĺ∑ kakiliman Yalisetute pakayni i nu uli a nananaman mitesek a palekal tu tebanay nu aiki a sapaikingkiw a sapidatemg, u nipicalilaw mulalad katukuh i malekalay tu a unyi hananay, sadikuday maala ni niwtun. pakayni i aadupan tu sapinanam sa, ya sapaculi nida i 19 nu siki anu palutatenga malucek sa, ya nikingkiwan ni nanaman pasu nuayawan a nidateng a nikinhkiwan, sadikuday nikingkiwan 19 a siki pulungen katukuh ayda ku sapadateng tu nikingkiwan. u sapi nanam sa, ci yalisetute a nutangah an nida a dateng i yiselan a milihayay atu yutay a milihayay mu duduc tu kakawsan idawtu ku macalaliaway mitedek tu, iteban nu siki, u kamu nida mududuc tu nu kilisetu a sapisinziya, widasa nu tinsukiw a kiwkay idaw ku mahiniay sapinanaman nu kakawsan. u sasakamun nida sa , kanahatu nulingatu katukuh tu macalalaway tu micedekay, nadikudan sa mukilul tu aydaay nu bangcalay a sasakamun makaala tu baluhay. ayda ci yalitute a nikingkiwan maudip tu i kakungkiwan tu nu cuwacuwaay. pakayni i sinilacul, ci yalisetute pakayni i kawaw misuwanis tu piadih a micalilaw tu mududuc tutebanay a siki atu patucek tu malukay, katukuh maadih ni yatangsemi a numukasiay u sapilacul nu sapananam. kanahatu ci yalisetute misulit tu yadahay a sasulitan tu dihemayay a sasakamuen "sisaylu sakamusa tu nisulitan nida tu wayway "ekima balad" sa" nika katuuday sakamu say a nisangaan nida tu sulit malaliyas tu sa, wida satu tuluay nu cacay sa kiya nitadasan nida amisulit mapaliwanay tu ayda masingatu. pulung nu mihcaan 342 amihcaan, Yalisetute mala wawa nu hunti ni Yalisanta asaydan. Yalisetute macitun a sakakaay ci huylipbu sakatusa muawaw taluma', namakayni i naayaway nu sila idaw kiya singangnnay a misulitay tu cuda ci pulutakek idaw ku nitengedan nida misulit, yalisetute pasayni tuamalasakakaay a kasenenga a tademaw pasubana' a hicaen ku katineng pasubana', u mamikuwan tu sitangahay atu sapalangaw. Yalisetute micukaymas cinida tu sapicalilaw tu udip, pasada ku nidateng cu yalisantaan kyu mapacekil tu baeketay nuheni a kawaw. Winisa tatenga macalilaw ni yalisetute, ci yalisata mapatay tu sapikingkiw tu tu kawaw atu miading tu tademaw , pakay ni tademawan kasenengan, pasuyda u hunti paini tu kibetulay a tademaw u kalisiw sapiedap, kyu ci yalisetute maedem ku nikingkiwan nida tu nananaman. nika, yalisetute aci yalisanta nu sapikuwa nikasasuadih nu heni caay kalecad kanahatu cay kasasulecad. Nuayawan asapikuwan pakayni i sapisaluma' nika amalawpes t uku sila a nipatektek sa, ci yalisan ta huti amupatideng cinida tu tanul nu sakay sila a binacadan u hengad hakiya u taluayaw tu pipatideng kya. .
S.PHON: jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô ***** kakir~…ĺiman jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô pakajni i nu ur~…ĺi a nananaman mit…ôs…ôk a par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu t…ôbanaj nu aiki a sapaikiŇčkiw a sapidat…ômg, u nipi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw mur~…ĺar~…ĺad katukuńß i mar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj tu a unji ńßananaj, sadikudaj maar~…ĺa ni niwtun. pakajni i aadupan tu sapinanam sa, ja sapa ¶ur~…ĺi nida i ** nu siki anu par~…ĺutat…ôŇča mar~…ĺu ¶…ôk sa, ja nikiŇčkiwan ni nanaman pasu nuajawan a nidat…ôŇč a nikinńßkiwan, sadikudaj nikiŇčkiwan ** a siki pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn katukuńß ajda ku sapadat…ôŇč tu nikiŇčkiwan. u sapi nanam sa, ¶i jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô a nutaŇčańß an nida a dat…ôŇč i jis…ôr~…ĺan a mir~…ĺińßajaj atu jutaj a mir~…ĺińßajaj mu dudu ¶ tu kakawsan idawtu ku ma ¶ar~…ĺar~…ĺiawaj mit…ôd…ôk tu, it…ôban nu siki, u kamu nida mududu ¶ tu nu kir~…ĺis…ôtu a sapisinzija, widasa nu tinsukiw a kiwkaj idaw ku mańßiniaj sapinanaman nu kakawsan. u sasakamun nida sa , kanańßatu nur~…ĺiŇčatu katukuńß tu ma ¶ar~…ĺar~…ĺawaj tu mi ¶…ôd…ôkaj, nadikudan sa mukir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ajdaaj nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a sasakamun makaar~…ĺa tu bar~…ĺuńßaj. ajda ¶i jar~…ĺitut…ô a nikiŇčkiwan maudip tu i kakuŇčkiwan tu nu ¶uwa ¶uwaaj. pakajni i sinir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ, ¶i jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô pakajni i kawaw misuwanis tu piadińß a mi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw tu mududu ¶ tut…ôbanaj a siki atu patu ¶…ôk tu mar~…ĺukaj, katukuńß maadińß ni jataŇčs…ômi a numukasiaj u sapir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu sapananam. kanańßatu ¶i jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô misur~…ĺit tu jadańßaj a sasur~…ĺitan tu dińß…ômajaj a sasakamu…ôn "sisajr~…ĺu sakamusa tu nisur~…ĺitan nida tu wajwaj "…ôkima bar~…ĺad" sa" nika katuudaj sakamu saj a nisaŇčaan nida tu sur~…ĺit mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu sa, wida satu tur~…ĺuaj nu ¶a ¶aj sa kija nitadasan nida amisur~…ĺit mapar~…ĺiwanaj tu ajda masiŇčatu. pur~…ĺuŇč nu mińß ¶aan *** amińß ¶aan, jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô mar~…ĺa wawa nu ńßunti ni jar~…ĺisanta asajdan. jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô ma ¶itun a sakakaaj ¶i ńßujr~…ĺipbu sakatusa muawaw tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, namakajni i naajawaj nu sir~…ĺa idaw kija siŇčaŇčnnaj a misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶uda ¶i pur~…ĺutak…ôk idaw ku nit…ôŇč…ôdan nida misur~…ĺit, jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô pasajni tuamar~…ĺasakakaaj a kas…ôn…ôŇča a tad…ômaw pasubana Ē~ ° a ńßi ¶a…ôn ku katin…ôŇč pasubana Ē~ °, u mamikuwan tu sitaŇčańßaj atu sapar~…ĺaŇčaw. jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô mi ¶ukajmas ¶inida tu sapi ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw tu udip, pasada ku nidat…ôŇč ¶u jar~…ĺisantaan kju mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ tu ba…ôk…ôtaj nuńß…ôni a kawaw. winisa tat…ôŇča ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw ni jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô, ¶i jar~…ĺisata mapataj tu sapikiŇčkiw tu tu kawaw atu miadiŇč tu tad…ômaw , pakaj ni tad…ômawan kas…ôn…ôŇčan, pasujda u ńßunti paini tu kib…ôtur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw u kar~…ĺisiw sapi…ôdap, kju ¶i jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô ma…ôd…ôm ku nikiŇčkiwan nida tu nananaman. nika, jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô a ¶i jar~…ĺisanta nu sapikuwa nikasasuadińß nu ńß…ôni ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kanańßatu ¶aj kasasur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. nuajawan asapikuwan pakajni i sapisar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nika amar~…ĺawp…ôs t uku sir~…ĺa a nipat…ôkt…ôk sa, ¶i jar~…ĺisan ta ńßuti amupatid…ôŇč ¶inida tu tanur~…ĺ nu sakaj sir~…ĺa a bina ¶adan u ńß…ôŇčad ńßakija u tar~…ĺuajaw tu pipatid…ôŇč kja. .
S.FORM: Yalisetute šļěťáĆśĖĮŚ§öŚĺ∑ kakiliman Yalisetute pakayni i nu uli a nananaman mitesek a palekal tu tebanay nu aiki a sapaikingkiw a sapidatemg, u nipicalilaw mulalad katukuh i malekalay tu a unyi hananay, sadikuday maala ni niwtun. pakayni i aadupan tu sapinanam sa, ya sapaculi nida i 19 nu siki anu palutatenga malucek sa, ya nikingkiwan ni nanaman pasu nuayawan a nidateng a nikinhkiwan, sadikuday nikingkiwan 19 a siki pulungen katukuh ayda ku sapadateng tu nikingkiwan. u sapi nanam sa, ci yalisetute a nutangah an nida a dateng i yiselan a milihayay atu yutay a milihayay mu duduc tu kakawsan idawtu ku macalaliaway mitedek tu, iteban nu siki, u kamu nida mududuc tu nu kilisetu a sapisinziya, widasa nu tinsukiw a kiwkay idaw ku mahiniay sapinanaman nu kakawsan. u sasakamun nida sa , kanahatu nulingatu katukuh tu macalalaway tu micedekay, nadikudan sa mukilul tu aydaay nu bangcalay a sasakamun makaala tu baluhay. ayda ci yalitute a nikingkiwan maudip tu i kakungkiwan tu nu cuwacuwaay. pakayni i sinilacul, ci yalisetute pakayni i kawaw misuwanis tu piadih a micalilaw tu mududuc tutebanay a siki atu patucek tu malukay, katukuh maadih ni yatangsemi a numukasiay u sapilacul nu sapananam. kanahatu ci yalisetute misulit tu yadahay a sasulitan tu dihemayay a sasakamuen "sisaylu sakamusa tu nisulitan nida tu wayway "ekima balad" sa" nika katuuday sakamu say a nisangaan nida tu sulit malaliyas tu sa, wida satu tuluay nu cacay sa kiya nitadasan nida amisulit mapaliwanay tu ayda masingatu. pulung nu mihcaan 342 amihcaan, Yalisetute mala wawa nu hunti ni Yalisanta asaydan. Yalisetute macitun a sakakaay ci huylipbu sakatusa muawaw taluma', namakayni i naayaway nu sila idaw kiya singangnnay a misulitay tu cuda ci pulutakek idaw ku nitengedan nida misulit, yalisetute pasayni tuamalasakakaay a kasenenga a tademaw pasubana' a hicaen ku katineng pasubana', u mamikuwan tu sitangahay atu sapalangaw. Yalisetute micukaymas cinida tu sapicalilaw tu udip, pasada ku nidateng cu yalisantaan kyu mapacekil tu baeketay nuheni a kawaw. Winisa tatenga macalilaw ni yalisetute, ci yalisata mapatay tu sapikingkiw tu tu kawaw atu miading tu tademaw , pakay ni tademawan kasenengan, pasuyda u hunti paini tu kibetulay a tademaw u kalisiw sapiedap, kyu ci yalisetute maedem ku nikingkiwan nida tu nananaman. nika, yalisetute aci yalisanta nu sapikuwa nikasasuadih nu heni caay kalecad kanahatu cay kasasulecad. Nuayawan asapikuwan pakayni i sapisaluma' nika amalawpes t uku sila a nipatektek sa, ci yalisan ta huti amupatideng cinida tu tanul nu sakay sila a binacadan u hengad hakiya u taluayaw tu pipatideng kya. .

jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô mar~…ĺa wawa nu ńßunti ni jar~…ĺisanta asajdan. jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô ma ¶itun a sakakaaj ¶i ńßujr~…ĺipbu sakatusa muawaw tar~…ĺuma Ē~ °, namakajni i naajawaj nu sir~…ĺa idaw kija siŇčaŇčnnaj a misur~…ĺitaj tu ¶uda ¶i pur~…ĺutak…ôk idaw ku nit…ôŇč…ôdan nida misur~…ĺit, jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô pasajni tuamar~…ĺasakakaaj a kas…ôn…ôŇča a tad…ômaw pasubana Ē~ ° a ńßi ¶a…ôn ku katin…ôŇč nuńß…ôni a kawaw. winisa tat…ôŇča ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw ni jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô, ¶i jar~…ĺisata mapataj tu sapikiŇčkiw tu tu kawaw atu miadiŇč tu tad…ômaw , pakaj ni tad…ômawan kas…ôn…ôŇčan, pasujda u ńßunti paini tu kib…ôtur~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw u kar~…ĺisiw sapi…ôdap, kju ¶i jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô ma…ôd…ôm ku nikiŇčkiwan nida tu nananaman. nika, jar~…ĺis…ôtut…ô a ¶i jar~…ĺisanta nu sapikuwa nikasasuadińß nu ńß…ôni ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kanańßatu ¶aj kasasur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. nuajawan asapikuwan pakajni i sapisar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nika amar~…ĺawp…ôs t uku sir~…ĺa a nipat…ôkt…ôk sa, ¶i jar~…ĺisan ta ńßuti amupatid…ôŇč ¶inida tu tanur~…ĺ nu sakaj sir~…ĺa a bina ¶adan u ńß…ôŇčad ńßakija u tar~…ĺuajaw tu pipatid…ôŇč kja. .
